description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that runs a before_script on every job to update apt, install python2/3 and pip, set up virtualenvs for both Python versions, install the package, execute its tests, build documentation with a custom script, and install awscli. Add a production job that runs only on tags, executes pip install twine, sets BUCKET='docs.seeq.io', syncs the built HTML docs to the S3 bucket docs.seeq.io/api/python/ using aws s3 sync, builds source and universal wheel distributions, and uploads them with twine. Add a staging job that runs only on the master branch, sets BUCKET='docs-staging.seeq.io', and syncs the same documentation to the S3 bucket docs-staging.seeq.io/api/python/.
